# InventoryManager

## Project Overview
InventoryManager is a simple inventory tracking system used to demonstrate Agile Scrum project management using GitHub Issues and GitHub Projects.

The system concept focuses on managing inventory items such as ingredients or supplies in a database. The repository simulates how development teams organize work using user stories, backlog items, and sprint boards.

## Core Features
- Add inventory items
- Edit inventory items
- Delete inventory items
- View current inventory levels
- Track inventory additions and usage
- Display low-stock alerts

## Agile Workflow
This project uses Agile Scrum practices:

- Product Backlog managed with GitHub Issues
- User stories representing system features
- Sprint planning using GitHub Projects
- Story points used for task estimation
- Issues moved across a board (To Do → In Progress → Done)

## Project Board
The Scrum board used for sprint tracking can be viewed here:
https://github.com/users/AustinBang/projects/2

## Technologies (Conceptual)
- GitHub Issues
- GitHub Projects
- Agile Scrum methodology
